narrative: Network analysis shows strong, stable edge weights across all node pairs (mean=0.65, std=0.12). Consistent activation patterns suggest synchronized operation.
Sparse connectivity observed (mean=0.15, std=0.08) with few active edges. Nodes operate quasi-independently with minimal coupling.
Mixed edge weight patterns (mean=0.32, std=0.38) with moderate variance. Some regions show coupling while others remain disconnected.
